nodes.name: Create a database page Create Observation

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const c = $('Code clean propriedades').item.json; const metrics = 'metrics.cost_micros, metrics.clicks, metrics.impressions, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value, metrics.ctr, metrics.average_cpc'; const day = c.date_d1; if (c.is_pmax) return { query: 'SELECT campaign.id, campaign.name, segments.date, ' + metrics + ' FROM campaign WHERE campaign.id = ' + c.clean_id_google_camp + " AND segments.date = '" + day + "'" }; return { query: 'SELECT campaign.id, campaign.name, ad_group.id, ad_group.name, ad_group_ad.ad.id, ad_group_ad.ad.name, ad_group_ad.status, segments.date, ' + metrics + ' FROM ad_group_ad WHERE ad_group_ad.ad.id = ' + c.clean_id_google_ad + " AND segments.date = '" + day + "'" }; })() }}

={{ (() => { const c = $('Code clean propriedades').item.json; const metrics = 'metrics.cost_micros, metrics.clicks, metrics.impressions, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value, metrics.ctr, metrics.average_cpc'; const range = " AND segments.date BETWEEN '" + c.date_d7_start + "' AND '" + c.date_d1 + "'"; if (c.is_pmax) return { query: 'SELECT campaign.id, campaign.name, segments.date, ' + metrics + ' FROM campaign WHERE campaign.id = ' + c.clean_id_google_camp + range }; return { query: 'SELECT campaign.id, campaign.name, ad_group.id, ad_group.name, ad_group_ad.ad.id, ad_group_ad.ad.name, ad_group_ad.status, segments.date, ' + metrics + ' FROM ad_group_ad WHERE ad_group_ad.ad.id = ' + c.clean_id_google_ad + range }; })() }}

={{ (() => { const c = $('Code clean propriedades').item.json; const metrics = 'metrics.cost_micros, metrics.clicks, metrics.impressions, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value, metrics.ctr, metrics.average_cpc'; const range = " AND segments.date BETWEEN '" + c.date_d3_start + "' AND '" + c.date_d1 + "'"; if (c.is_pmax) return { query: 'SELECT campaign.id, campaign.name, segments.date, ' + metrics + ' FROM campaign WHERE campaign.id = ' + c.clean_id_google_camp + range }; return { query: 'SELECT campaign.id, campaign.name, ad_group.id, ad_group.name, ad_group_ad.ad.id, ad_group_ad.ad.name, ad_group_ad.status, segments.date, ' + metrics + ' FROM ad_group_ad WHERE ad_group_ad.ad.id = ' + c.clean_id_google_ad + range }; })() }}

={{ (() => { const c = $('Code clean propriedades').item.json; const metrics = 'metrics.cost_micros, metrics.clicks, metrics.impressions, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value, metrics.ctr, metrics.average_cpc'; const range = " AND segments.date BETWEEN '" + c.date_d30_start + "' AND '" + c.date_d1 + "'"; if (c.is_pmax) return { query: 'SELECT campaign.id, campaign.name, segments.date, ' + metrics + ' FROM campaign WHERE campaign.id = ' + c.clean_id_google_camp + range }; return { query: 'SELECT campaign.id, campaign.name, ad_group.id, ad_group.name, ad_group_ad.ad.id, ad_group_ad.ad.name, ad_group_ad.status, segments.date, ' + metrics + ' FROM ad_group_ad WHERE ad_group_ad.ad.id = ' + c.clean_id_google_ad + range }; })() }}

={{ (() => { const c = $('Code clean propriedades').item.json; if (c.is_pmax) { const metrics = 'metrics.cost_micros, metrics.clicks, metrics.impressions, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value, metrics.ctr, metrics.average_cpc'; const range = " AND segments.date BETWEEN '" + c.date_d30_start + "' AND '" + c.date_d1 + "'"; return { query: 'SELECT campaign.id, campaign.name, segments.date, ' + metrics + ' FROM campaign WHERE campaign.id = ' + c.clean_id_google_camp + range }; } return { query: 'SELECT campaign.id, search_term_view.search_term, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.conversions, metrics.cost_micros FROM search_term_view WHERE segments.date DURING LAST_30_DAYS ORDER BY metrics.clicks DESC LIMIT 50' }; })() }}

={{ (() => { const c = $('Code clean propriedades').item.json; if (c.is_pmax) { const metrics = 'metrics.cost_micros, metrics.clicks, metrics.impressions, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value, metrics.ctr, metrics.average_cpc'; const range = " AND segments.date BETWEEN '" + c.date_d30_start + "' AND '" + c.date_d1 + "'"; return { query: 'SELECT campaign.id, campaign.name, segments.date, ' + metrics + ' FROM campaign WHERE campaign.id = ' + c.clean_id_google_camp + range }; } return { query: "SELECT campaign.id, segments.ad_network_type, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.conversions, metrics.cost_micros FROM campaign WHERE segments.date DURING LAST_30_DAYS AND campaign.status = 'ENABLED'" }; })() }}

parameters.sqlQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n_dias, SUM(IF(date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('America/Sao_Paulo'), INTERVAL 3 DAY), cost, 0)) AS cost_3, SUM(IF(date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('America/Sao_Paulo'), INTERVAL 3 DAY), conversions, 0)) AS conv_3, SUM(IF(date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('America/Sao_Paulo'), INTERVAL 3 DAY), clicks, 0)) AS clicks_3, SUM(IF(date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('America/Sao_Paulo'), INTERVAL 3 DAY), impressions, 0)) AS impr_3, 0 AS rev_3, SUM(IF(date < DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('America/Sao_Paulo'), INTERVAL 3 DAY) AND date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('America/Sao_Paulo'), INTERVAL 6 DAY), cost, 0)) AS cost_prev3, SUM(IF(date < DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('America/Sao_Paulo'), INTERVAL 3 DAY) AND date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('America/Sao_Paulo'), INTERVAL 6 DAY), conversions, 0)) AS conv_prev3, SUM(IF(date < DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('America/Sao_Paulo'), INTERVAL 3 DAY) AND date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('America/Sao_Paulo'), INTERVAL 6 DAY), clicks, 0)) AS clicks_prev3, SUM(IF(date < DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('America/Sao_Paulo'), INTERVAL 3 DAY) AND date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('America/Sao_Paulo'), INTERVAL 6 DAY), impressions, 0)) AS impr_prev3, 0 AS rev_prev3 FROM `project-0e7c58d4-656f-49e8-807.phi_prod.raw_campaign_data` WHERE campaign_id = '{{ $json.bq_campaign_id }}' AND date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('America/Sao_Paulo'), INTERVAL 21 DAY)

propertyValues.textContent: ={{ Number($('Code classificar status').item.json.clicks_7d) ? ' ' + $('Code classificar status').item.json.clicks_7d + ' ( ' + ($('Code classificar status').item.json.clicks_30d ?? 0) + ')' : '' }}
={{ Number($('Code classificar status').item.json.cpa_7d) ? 'R$ ' + $('Code classificar status').item.json.cpa_7d + ' (R$ ' + ($('Code classificar status').item.json.cpa_30d ?? 0) + ')' : '' }}
={{ Number($('Code classificar status').item.json.cpc_7d) ? 'R$ ' + $('Code classificar status').item.json.cpc_7d + ' (R$ ' + ($('Code classificar status').item.json.cpc_30d ?? 0) + ')' : '' }}
={{ Number($('Code classificar status').item.json.cpm_7d) ? 'R$ ' + $('Code classificar status').item.json.cpm_7d + ' (R$ ' + ($('Code classificar status').item.json.cpm_30d ?? 0) + ')' : '' }}
={{ Number($('Code classificar status').item.json.ctr_7d) ? $('Code classificar status').item.json.ctr_7d + '% (' + ($('Code classificar status').item.json.ctr_30d ?? 0) + '%)' : '' }}

={{ Number($('Code classificar status').item.json.impressions_7d) ? ' ' + $('Code classificar status').item.json.impressions_7d + ' ( ' + ($('Code classificar status').item.json.impressions_30d ?? 0) + ')' : '' }}

={{ Number($('Code classificar status').item.json.valor_real) ? 'R$ ' + $('Code classificar status').item.json.valor_real + ' (R$ ' + ($('Code classificar status').item.json.cpa_30d ?? 0) + ')' : '' }}
={{ $('Code Preparar Payload de Observação').item.json.properties['Fonte do Dado'].select.name }}

={{ Number($('Code classificar status').item.json.taxa_conversao_7d) ? $('Code classificar status').item.json.taxa_conversao_7d + '% (' + ($('Code classificar status').item.json.taxa_conversao_30d ?? 0) + '%)' : '' }}
